title: Digital Marketing Specialist
required_skills: Digital marketing / performance marketing / demand generation experience
Strong execution mindset — building and optimising campaigns
Ability to analyse performance and continuously improve results
bonus_skills: B2B marketing or growth marketing exposure
matched_skills: B2B marketing exposure (Marketing Manager at Intelligent Power Corporation; GRG Banking; Moli Media)
Campaign execution and Go-to-Market strategy (multiple roles)
Performance analysis / KPI reporting / ROI analysis (Power BI, Looker Studio)
Cross-functional collaboration with Product Marketing and regional teams
Demand generation awareness via GTM campaigns and ICP-based positioning
missing_skills: LinkedIn Campaign Manager (no hands-on paid campaign management mentioned)
Paid social / Meta advertising (not present in CV)
Canva or basic ad design skills
core_responsibilities: Build, launch, and optimise paid campaigns across LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, and Meta
Generate high-quality MQLs and SQLs from target ICP accounts
Own campaign performance end-to-end from click to conversion
Collaborate with Product Marketing and Regional teams to refine targeting and messaging
Experiment with new tools, AI capabilities, and growth tactics
recommended_emphasis: Score 36 — below 50 threshold; critical gap is hands-on paid media platforms (LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, Meta)
B2B IoT background is a positive signal but execution-focused paid media role requires platform experience
Recommend skip unless user obtains Google Ads / LinkedIn Campaign Manager certification first
